payload.description: Agentic AI systems that integrate multiple models are transitioning from experimental to production use, especially in specialized enterprise workflows such as legal services.
payload.watch_next_week: Track additional enterprise deployments of multi-model agentic AI and partnerships in regulated industries.

payload.signal: AI security vulnerabilities emerging in workflow-integrated applications
payload.description: As AI applications become embedded in enterprise workflows, new security vulnerabilities are being identified, signaling a growing need for specialized AI security solutions.
payload.watch_next_week: Monitor developments in AI security measures and responses to newly discovered vulnerabilities in AI-integrated workflows.
